task.title: Enforce file-structure and package reachability audits
task.summary: Add deterministic checks for dogfood/source taxonomy, stale architecture references, misplaced scripts/tests, package reachability, generated-vs-canonical parity, and lock/audit readiness.

goal.outcome: The class of file-structure drift recently found manually is caught by automated architecture/audit checks.
acceptance: Checks fail on forbidden source folders, stale CodeWiki path references, misplaced product logic under scripts, and generated/canonical task-view mismatch.
Package audit fails when shipped source is unreachable/stale, lockfile is missing, or package dry-run includes/omits unexpected artifacts.
Tests or fixtures intentionally introduce drift and confirm checks fail.
non_goals: Do not refactor large UI files unless required for checks.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Move workflow vocabulary from prose to deterministic checks so deprecated roadmap status/phase values cannot reappear silently.
Remove deprecated `verify` as roadmap status/phase from emitted code, UI, schema, docs, and dogfood active queue.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Workflow drift guard exists and passes.
evidence_mapping.evidence: `npm run check:architecture` passes with new workflow-drift checks.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Deprecated verify status/phase no longer emitted.
evidence_mapping.evidence: `npm run test:smoke` passes after smoke expectations changed to `in_progress` and canonical board columns.

summary: TASK-081 removes deprecated roadmap verify phase/status and adds deterministic workflow drift guard.

source: user feedback: drifts continue to surface; CodeWiki must prevent them

evidence: Architecture check fails on stale workflow constants, schema literals, or active dogfood roadmap statuses.
Smoke tests now expect canonical status `in_progress` after resume and no `Verify` board column.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Removed `verify` from canonical status/phase constants and tool schema.
Mapped legacy `research`/`implement`/`verify` inputs to `in_progress`/`implement` for compatibility instead of emitting them.
Added check-architecture workflow drift assertions so CI/npm test fails on recurrence.
notes: This addresses root failure: policy wording became executable drift guard. Existing historical roadmap events may still contain legacy values, but active queue and product code no longer emit them.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Architecture check fails on stale workflow constants, schema literals, or active dogfood roadmap statuses.
Smoke tests now expect canonical status `in_progress` after resume and no `Verify` board column.
code_change_evidence: Removed `verify` from canonical status/phase constants and tool schema.
Mapped legacy `research`/`implement`/`verify` inputs to `in_progress`/`implement` for compatibility instead of emitting them.
Added check-architecture workflow drift assertions so CI/npm test fails on recurrence.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Deprecated roadmap `verify` phase/status cannot drift back into machine contracts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `scripts/check-architecture.mjs` now asserts canonical `ROADMAP_STATUS_VALUES`, canonical `TASK_PHASE_VALUES`, no Pi schema `verify` literal, and no active roadmap queue task with deprecated `research`/`implement`/`verify` status.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Roadmap status answers work-state, not validation/truth-state.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `ROADMAP_STATUS_VALUES` now contains only `todo`, `in_progress`, `blocked`, `done`, `cancelled`; evidence pass no longer writes `verify` status, and close remains separate.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: UI/docs stop presenting Verify as roadmap state.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Roadmap/Board docs and status/control-room columns now use canonical Todo/Implement/Done or Gate/Done wording instead of a Verify phase/status.
`npm test` passes with updated smoke expectations and architecture drift guard.

closure_brief.user_intent: Stop CodeWiki from letting stale roadmap workflow concepts drift back into code and docs.
implemented_changes: Canonical roadmap statuses reduced to work-state values only.
Deprecated `verify` phase/status removed from tool schema, transitions, UI lanes, docs, and active dogfood roadmap tasks.
Architecture check now enforces workflow vocabulary and active queue status drift.
Smoke tests updated to prove canonical `in_progress` semantics and absence of `Verify` board column.
non_goals_preserved: Did not rewrite immutable historical roadmap events.
Did not close tasks without commit-proof validation.
remaining_risks: Fresh implementation validation and per-task commit still required.

risks: Historical archived events still contain legacy `verify` status for old closed tasks; guard intentionally checks active queue, not immutable history.
Some variable/function names still use verifier as role terminology; product term remains validation gateway.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: TASK-081 prevent roadmap workflow drift
commit.body:
Replace deprecated roadmap verify phase/status with canonical work-state statuses and add deterministic architecture drift guard.

Checks: npm run typecheck; npm run check:architecture; npm run test:smoke; npm run test:features; npm run test:pack; npm test
Validation: replace <pending-validation> with implementation validation report ref before commit.
